BAM_news.title: New Beginning
BAM_news.content: Laila Majnu is now officially under development at ITSAGameStudio. A fresh journey begins with a reimagined storyline, enhanced visuals, and immersive gameplay inspired by classic love legends.
BAM_news.author: ITSAGameStudio

BAM_news.title: Core Development
BAM_news.content: Core gameplay systems are now in progress. The game will feature emotional storytelling, character-driven missions, and smooth performance optimized for mobile devices.
BAM_news.author: Abhijeet Patil

BAM_news.title: Story Mode
BAM_news.content: Experience a deep love story inspired by classic legends. Players will explore narrative-driven missions and meaningful choices throughout the journey.
BAM_news.author: Abhijeet Patil

BAM_news.title: World & Environment
BAM_news.content: Explore beautifully designed environments including villages, deserts, and emotional landmarks that enhance the storytelling experience.
BAM_news.author: Abhijeet Patil

BAM_news.title: Optimization & Polish
BAM_news.content: Focused on performance improvements, smoother gameplay, and fixing early development bugs to ensure a stable experience on all supported devices.
BAM_news.author: ITSAGameStudio
